creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 213865
Update shells/ammonite to 2.1.1

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update shells/ammonite to 2.1.1.

ChangeLog
---------

- Support for Scala 2.12.11 and 2.13.2
- add watchValue to InterpAPI
- fix url classpath handling
- add ability to watch arbitrary expressions in scripts
- add new API
- remove dead code
- integration with coursier
- several fixes and cleanups

Kind regards,

Jens
